po_authorization_ref: PO authorization — prepare the complete Phase 1B implementation plan (planning/documentation only)
scope_allowed: Author the Phase 1B implementation plan + inventories + privilege matrix.
scope_prohibited: No implementation; no DB/DDL/DML/role/DSN/service/PMS/network/deployment change; Phase 1B NOT implemented.
next_action: Product-Owner approval or rejection of the Phase 1B plan
